title: Make Demo Preview an accessible editable local Sandbox
objective: Add bounded itinerary and Checklist editing, Reset confirmation, and local-only status to DemoTripPreview without cloud side effects.
acceptanceCriteria: Support itinerary add, edit, delete, drag reorder, arrival-time changes, and note changes through supplied local callbacks.
Support Checklist add, edit, toggle, delete, and assignee selection limited to owner or unassigned.
Add an explicit Reset button with confirmation and keep Reset visually and behaviorally separate from Clone.
Show persistent-versus-memory-only and local-only Sandbox status accessibly.
Remove read-only labels where no longer true while labelling expenses, settlements, tickets, and attachments preview-only where retained.
Do not expose expense, settlement, ticket, attachment, Storage, or collaboration editing.
Provide keyboard, focus, accessible-name, Desktop, and Mobile behavior.
Do not call Firebase, myTrips, Offline Cache, Storage, or production services.
